headline: Own Regeneron For Biotech Growth? Incyte Is Making Its Case.
summary: For investors seeking exposure to biotechnology's future, Incyte presents a clearer forward picture of accelerating growth, while the larger Regeneron asks for more faith in its pipeline.

headline: Disappointing Trial Results Hurt Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (REGN) in Q2
summary: Longleaf Partners, managed by Southeastern Asset Management, released its second-quarter 2026 investor letter for its “Partners Fund”. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The letter states that the portfolio holdings are attractive now based on both P/V and P/FCF metrics. However, the Fund returned 3.87% in the quarter, significantly lagging the S&P 500’s […]
